esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// sys_rss / sys_totalmem > 0.85 indicates memory pressure, OOM risk
// Adjust threshold for your host memory allocation
| WHERE metrics.sys_rss IS NOT NULL AND metrics.sys_totalmem IS NOT NULL
  AND metrics.sys_totalmem > 0
| EVAL mem_util = metrics.sys_rss / metrics.sys_totalmem
| WHERE mem_util > 0.85
| STATS mem_util = MAX(mem_util), rss = MAX(metrics.sys_rss)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id
| SORT mem_util DESC
